captures.alt: The white ship near the bottom centre of a black screen, at rest before firing.

captures.caption: Firing with voice 1 configured but never gated: the recording is silent. A set-up voice makes no sound on its own.
captures.alt: A silent audio recording — firing produces no sound, because the voice is configured but its gate is never set.

captures.caption: With the gate set but the pitch fixed: a sound plays, but it's a flat buzzy blip — it doesn't read as a laser.
captures.alt: A short, flat, buzzy tone at a constant pitch — it makes a sound, but not a laser-like one.

captures.caption: The same shot with the pitch swept downwards: a bright 'pew' that drops in pitch as it fires and decays away.
captures.alt: A laser 'pew' — a bright tone that starts high and rapidly slides down in pitch over about a quarter-second as it fades.
The yellow bullet sprite rising from the ship towards the top of the screen, a short way above it.
